rule: Automation contract. Tests must prove the business workflow, not only render the screen.

apiAndDataRequirements.title: Employee Management Overview - API/Data: Read Employee Management records API/data source
acceptanceCriteria: API/Data requirement "Read Employee Management records API/data source" is visible or functionally represented under Employee Management / Employee Management Overview.
The implementation uses Employee Management terminology, workflow context, validation behavior, and status language.
Loading, empty, validation, permission, error, and audit behavior are covered where applicable.
businessRules: Employee Onboarding required fields are validated
Employee Onboarding business rules are enforced for Employee Management
Employee Onboarding status is updated and audited

qaScenarios.positiveTest: Create HumanResources Record succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
qaScenarios.negativeTest: Create HumanResources Record is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
qaScenarios.accessTest: Create HumanResources Record is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
qaScenarios.validationTest: Each business validation listed for Human Resources is independently exercised against Create HumanResources Record.
qaScenarios.workflowTest: Full lifecycle test: create -> Create HumanResources Record -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
qaScenarios.regressionRisk: High - core lifecycle step, breaking this blocks the whole module
